name: selwyn-handbook
description: Selwyn Uy's process as installable skills: discovery to PRD, the anti-slop writing check, brand voice, the Next.js scaffold, the Next.js 16 facts check, the full Next.js security audit, review-before-commit, the SEO audit, the AI-legibility audit, the launch checklist run, verify-before-ship, session continuity, and the architecture decision log. Drawn from selwynuy.dev.
